request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Critical Alert: Our allies are taking advantage of our generosity. While we maintain our commitments, they're cutting defense budgets and leaving us to bear the burden. Remember the 2026 NATO summit? They promised more, delivered less. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider our unconditional support. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
